title: Furby Minis Collectible Figures 12-Pack with Changing Eyes & Hair Tufts, Tiny 2.5 cm Toys for Kids, Party Bag Fillers, Expand the Collectable Furby-Verse, Ideal Christmas Toys For Girls & Boys 6+
features: ITTY BITTY NOO-LAHS: Meet the Furby Minis! These adorable 2.5 cm Series 1 Furby mini-figures bring big personality in tiny form. Small enough to fit in your pocket, they’re perfect for collecting, gifting and everyday imaginative play.

FUNKY CHANGING EYES: Each Furby Mini has lenticular eyes that change design when tilted or viewed from different angles. This cool detail gives every figure its own fun, dynamic expression, making them extra collectible and engaging.

FLOOFY HAIR TUFTS: Every figure combines a colourful plastic body with a soft floofy “fur-hawk,” bringing that iconic Furby look to life. The mix of textures makes them feel fun to hold and display, with a dash of Furby nostalgia.

FOOD & PARTY THEMES: From disco balls to cakes, gift boxes, piñatas and even tiny DJ Furby friends, these themed designs add silly charm. Perfect for party play, storytelling or brightening up any collection with playful detail.

COLLECT, PLAY & DISPLAY: Furby Minis are small enough to travel anywhere - clip them into bags, use them as party bag fillers, or line them up as colourful desk toys. Fun to play with and just as fun to show off as décor.

FESTIVE WIN, ZERO FUSS: Wrap-ready and instantly recognisable, these Furby Minis are perfect for Santa stocking fillers - cute, portable and guaranteed to raise a smile. Tick it off your list and get back to the festive fun.
description: Product Description Oh-kah-tee! The Furby Minis Collectible Figures 12-Pack brings the Furby-verse to life in adorable tiny form. Each 2.5 cm figure features funky lenticular eyes that change designs when tilted, plus a soft floofy hair tuft for that iconic Furby look. With fun food and party-inspired themes—including disco balls, cakes, gifts, piñatas and even tiny DJ Furby friends—these figures pack a big dose of personality into a pocket-sized toy. Kids can play, collect, or simply enjoy them as colourful decorations. Designed for children aged 6+, Furby Minis are as versatile as they are fun. Hand the whole pack over as a brilliant gift, or share them out individually as party favours, stocking fillers or classroom rewards. They’re perfect for goodie bags, imaginative storytelling or decorating bedrooms and desks with Furby flair. Add them to other Furby toys—like Furblets and big interactive Furbys (sold separately)—to expand the Furby-verse and fuel even more creativity. Whether collected, displayed or shared with friends, Furby Minis are a fun and FURB-ulous way to bring smiles everywhere. Safety Warning Ages 5 years and up Warning: Choking Hazard – Small parts. Not for children under 3 years.
